title: Second-trimester nutrition
excerpt: Often the most comfortable phase for eating: growth accelerates, weight gain steadies, and activity can increase — ACOG-aligned priorities.
content:
## Characteristics

Nausea often eases; appetite returns. Fetal growth speeds up — nutrient quality matters more than “eating for two” in volume.

## Priorities

- Balanced plates: starch + protein + vegetables.
- Omega-3 from low-mercury cooked fish.
- Calcium and continued folate/iron as prescribed.

## Weight gain

Track trends with your clinician against pre-pregnancy BMI ranges.

## Activity

Walking, prenatal yoga, or swimming if approved supports metabolism and mood.
metaTitle: Second-trimester nutrition | Bầu Ăn Gì? Blog
metaDescription: Mid-pregnancy nutrition priorities: protein, iron, calcium, fiber, and healthy weight gain.
author: Bầu Ăn Gì? Team
